title: Expand hook trigger points (SessionEnd, UserPromptSubmit, Notification, Stop, SubagentStop)
description:
CC has more hook trigger points than OC. Current OC hooks: PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart. Missing: SessionEnd, UserPromptSubmit, Notification, Stop, SubagentStop, PreCompact.

## Scope
- Add HookEvent variants in src/hooks/
- Wire trigger points:
  - SessionEnd: App Drop impl
  - UserPromptSubmit: before first API turn in spawn_api_turn
  - Notification: on important events (permission denied, token limit, etc.)
  - Stop: on assistant final response
  - SubagentStop: on subagent completion
  - PreCompact: in compaction.rs before summarization

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/hooks/
